title: - Dynamic Base16, Frosted Glass Theme (not required for current look)
content:
- Dynamic Base16, Frosted Glass Theme (not required for current look)
- Extra AI assistants (keep only primary to reduce overhead: e.g. Copilot or Gemini, not both, plus remove ChatGPT/Pieces if not essential to look)

**Minimal Appearance Settings (Drop-In)**
```jsonc
{
"workbench.colorTheme": "Default Dark+",
"workbench.editor.pinnedTabsOnSeparateRow": true,
"window.autoDetectColorScheme": true,
"editor.inlayHints.padding": true,
"editor.bracketPairColorization.independentColorPoolPerBracketType": true,
"workbench.colorCustomizations": {
// Accent color replacing Peacock (choose one)
"activityBar.activeBorder": "#4FC3F7",
"activityBarBadge.background": "#4FC3F7",
"statusBar.background": "#1E1E1E",
"tab.activeBorderTop": "#4FC3F7",
"terminal.ansiCyan": "#4FC3F7"
},
"editor.cursorBlinking": "expand",
